title: AUTONOMOUS BODIES NATIONAL ELECTORAL INSTITUTE
description: Resolution of the General Council of the National Electoral Institute approving the result of the procedure carried out to verify that the candidates for various positions of federal popular election have not incurred any of the assumptions established in thearticle 38, section VII, of the Political Constitution of the United Mexican States, or article 442 Bis, in relation to 456, numeral 1, subsection c), section III, of the General Law of Electoral Institutions and Procedures, in theFederal Electoral 2023-2024.

title: AUTONOMOUS BODIES FEDERAL COURT OF CONCILIATION AND ARBITRATION
description: Agreement issued by the Plenary Session of the Federal Court of Conciliation and Arbitration, of May twenty-eight, two thousand twenty-four, declaring the suspension of activities on May thirty-first, two thousand twenty-four, at 2:30 p.m., therefore, there will be noprocedural terms from the aforementioned time, derived from "The Electoral Shielding of the Federal Electoral Process 2023-2024".
